case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. CHRISTIE A RAFANAN

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUL-20-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAFANAN, CHRISTIE A $5,450.55 PRINCIPAL, $875.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $252.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,578.50, SEE SCANNED DOC
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-20-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100033880), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SERVED APR-20-2018, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE APR-16-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT RAFANAN, CHRISTIE A
PROOF OF SERVICE ON STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT AND JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100036693) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT RAFANAN, CHRISTIE A SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-20-2018
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100036693) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT RAFANAN, CHRISTIE A
